title: Everything You Need to Know About PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: Imagine you're a digital creator from Nigeria trying to sell an ebook through Payhip. But every time you try to set up a payment gateway, you hit a brick wall due to geo-restrictions imposed by PayPal. This isn't just a Nigeria problem – it's a global issue affecting creators in 50 countries. When you can't get paid for your work, it's like getting shut down by the system. But with Core Shop Engine, you can take back control and start selling your digital products globally. Let's dive into the technology behind automated PDF receipt generation and how it can save your digital store.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated PDF receipt generation is a crucial feature for any e-commerce platform, especially for digital stores. It ensures that customers receive a digital receipt immediately after making a purchase, providing proof of transaction and giving them peace of mind. In a world where digital transactions are on the rise, having a seamless and automated receipt generation system is vital for building trust with your customers and fostering loyalty.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Under the hood, automated PDF receipt generation relies on a combination of technologies, including webhooks, API integrations, and bot engines. When a customer makes a purchase, a webhook is triggered, sending a notification to the Core Shop Engine bot engine. The bot engine then generates a PDF receipt using the customer's purchase details and sends it to the customer via email. This process happens in real-time, ensuring that customers receive their receipts promptly.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Core Shop Engine is designed for digital creators who face geo-restrictions or payment processing hurdles. Whether you're a writer from Kenya trying to sell ebooks on Gumroad or a software developer from Iran looking to sell digital products on a platform like PayHip, Core Shop Engine provides a reliable and automated way to generate PDF receipts for your customers. By using Core Shop Engine, you can focus on creating more content and growing your business, without worrying about the technicalities of payment processing.
Automated PDF receipt generation is a game-changer for digital stores, providing a seamless and secure experience for customers.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine is composed of several key components that work together to provide automated PDF receipt generation. These include the bot engine, API integrations, and webhook-driven delivery. The bot engine is responsible for generating the PDF receipt, while the API integrations provide a seamless connection to payment processors like NOWPayments. The webhook-driven delivery ensures that receipts are sent to customers in real-time, providing a smooth and automated experience.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand how automated PDF receipt generation works, it's time to take action. Start by setting up a Core Shop Engine account and integrating it with your payment processor. Next, configure the webhook settings to trigger receipt generation after each purchase. Finally, test your receipt generation system to ensure that it's working correctly. By following these steps, you can start generating PDF receipts automatically and take your digital store to the next level.

Your Action Checklist

Here's a step-by-step checklist to help you get started with automated PDF receipt generation using Core Shop Engine: Create a Core Shop Engine account and integrate it with your payment processor; Configure the webhook settings to trigger receipt generation after each purchase; Test your receipt generation system to ensure it's working correctly; Set up email notifications to send receipts to customers; Monitor your receipt generation metrics to optimize your system.
